headline: Donate with confidence. Every dollar gets tracked in public.
subheadline: This fund accepts community donations and publishes receipts, notes, and totals so supporters can see exactly where money goes.

donationLinks.name: Stripe
donationLinks.description: Best for debit/credit cards. Replace this URL with your Stripe Payment Link.

donationLinks.name: PayPal
donationLinks.description: Simple option for one-time donations. Replace with your PayPal.me or donate URL.

donationLinks.name: Cash App
donationLinks.description: Fast mobile donations. Replace with your $cashtag URL.

donationLinks.name: Crypto
donationLinks.description: Add your BTC, Lightning, USDC, or other public donation address page.
